notes: Community sources may be partial or conflict with official sources

locations.name: Area18
locations.description: Area18 is one of the main commercial ports for interplanetary traffic for the surrounding region of ArcCorp. Travelers can find a variety of goods from trusted names as well as local providers, if they're not overwhelmed by the sights and sounds of this landing zone. Security is taken very seriously on the surface, as ArcCorp has enlisted (notorious) private security firm BlacJac Security to maintain the peace. The Observist advises if you have problems, to head to the local UEE Advocacy office instead. Area18 features a number of common stores including CenterMass, Abernathy Interiors, Dumper's Depot, Casaba, et cetera. == Districts == === ArcCorp Plaza === ArcCorp Plaza is the main plaza of Area18, which you first enter into when coming from Cityflight Transit. The plaza gives access to all the other zones of Area18. Prominently situated in the center of the plaza is Memphis Avery's ic

locations.name: New Babbage
locations.description: New Babbage is the largest city on planet microTech and a major trading hub, serving as headquarters for software and high-end electronics manufacturer microTech. The landing zone is also a haven for small tech companies, as the cold climate makes for an ideal location to house heat-sensitive computing and manufacturing centers. Large public spaces are enclosed under domes to protect inhabitants against the planet's freezing elements. == Districts == === New Babbage Interstellar Spaceport === New Babbage Interstellar Spaceport sits outside of New Babbage, on the opposite side of the frozen lake. The structure is built into the side of the mountain and supports large volumes of traffic landing and taking off constantly. Next to the spaceport is a set of garages, where you can go to park or retrieve your vehicle if you desire to travel by ground instead of taking the transit system. === Th

locations.name: Lorville
locations.description: Lorville is one of the many company towns Hurston Dynamics has established for its employees on the company-owned planet Hurston. Lorville is the only important landing zone on the planet. While the city overlooks some of the larger strip-mining operations that are currently underway, it exists in the shadow of Central Tower, the corporate headquarters for Hurston Dynamics. Lorville is surrounded by a wall that dwarfs even decently sized ships. The City is located in the Desert, and is close to the Polluted Coast biome. "Took some incredible photos of Lorville the other day. I know the pollution there isn't great for you, but if it's magic hour and the wind's blowin' in the right direction, you can get some incredible shots of the skyline."NPC conversation == Etymology == After Hurston Dynamics purchased Stanton I, the planet was thoroughly scanned to locate the most resource rich sector

locations.name: Seraphim Station
locations.description: Seraphim Station is a R&R-owned space station located in the trade lanes above Crusader, offering breathtaking views of the planet below. It is named after Seraphim Systems, a former shuttlecraft manufacturer based in Tram, which was purchased by August Dunlow and then rebranded as Crusader Industries. == Trade data == == Vehicle rental == Players are able to rent a selection of vehicles from the Cargo Center. Available rental ships: == Gallery == == Development == == References ==

locations.name: Everus Harbor
locations.description: Everus Harbor is a space station that is in a geostationary orbit around Hurston above the city of Lorville. It serves as the primary trading port for Lorville. It is owned and operated by Hurston Dynamics. Hurston's primary port of call for Lorville for all large-scale incoming and outgoing cargo. Everus Harbor has been outfitted with a handful of amenities for capital ships and travelers looking for a quick stopover before heading down to the planet surface. == Trade data == == Vehicle Rental (Cargo Center) == Everus Harbor features a Travelers Rental terminal within the Cargo Center. The terminal is adjacent to the Cargo Supplies storefront. From this terminal, players are able to rent a selection of ships. Prices are in aUEC. When renting for more than one day, the rate is not flat. The more days you rent, the lower the average cost is per day. The discount follows this pattern: == C

locations.name: Baijini Point
locations.description: Baijini Point is a space station in geostationary orbit around ArcCorp, located above Area18. == In-game description == The primary cargo and transfer point for ArcCorp. Perfect as a waypoint on your down or back from the surface, Baijini Point features plenty of amenities for travelers while also providing a top-tier loading/unloading system for capital ships that are unable to head down to the surface. Includes shops and services like: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Ship Components, Clothing, Food, and Habs. == Visitor information == === Stores & services === === Food & drink === Storable items can be kept within your personal storage and consumed later. == Trading == == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: Port Tressler
locations.description: Port Tressler is a space station in geostationary orbit around planet microTech, located above New Babbage. Owned and operated by microTech, it is named after Aleena Tressler, who was a mentor to the company's founder, Magnus Tobin. == In-game description == Located in the trade lane above microTech, Port Tressler is the main transfer hub for New Babbage. Millions of SCU pass through this station everyday between exports from microTech and the other companies on the surface and the resources and trade coming in from the other systems. Includes shops and services like: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Ship Components, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, and Habs. == Trading == == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: ARC-L1 Wide Forest Station
locations.description: ARC-L1 Wide Forest Station is a Rest Stop owned by Rest & Relax, located in ArcCorp's L1 Lagrangian point. == In-game description == Located at the L1 Lagrange point of ArcCorp (Stanton III), Rest & Relax's Wide Forest Station offers a wide variety of shops and services for the weary traveler including: Refueling, Restocking, Ship Components, Personal Armor, Personal Weapons, Clothing, Food, and Habs. Also features a Refinery. == Visitor information == === Stores & services === === Food & drink === Storable items can be kept within your personal storage and consumed later. == Trading == == Refinery Services == === Mining Support Center === Last updated with information from Alpha 3.16.0 == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: ARC-L2 Lively Pathway Station
locations.description: ARC-L2 Lively Pathway Station is a Rest & Relax owned Rest Stop located in ArcCorp's L2 Lagrangian point. == In-game description == Owned and operated by Rest & Relax, this station offers plenty of amenities for space-weary travelers. Besides being able to restock and refuel their ships, visitors can rest up and find several shops to peruse for provisions and refreshments. == Visitor information == == Trading == == Development == The space station was added to the Stanton system in the Alpha 3.17.2 update. == References ==

locations.name: MIC-L3 Endless Odyssey Station
locations.description: MIC-L3 Endless Odyssey Station is a Rest & Relax owned Rest Stop located in microTech's L3 Lagrangian point. == In-game description == Located at the L3 Lagrange point of microTech (Stanton IV), Rest & Relax's Endless Odyssey Station offers a wide variety of shops and services for the weary traveler including: Refueling, Restocking, Ship Components, Ship Weapons, Personal Weapons, Food, a Clinic, and Habs. == Trading == == Development == The space station was added to the Stanton system in the Alpha 3.17.2 update. == References ==

locations.name: Aberdeen
locations.description: Aberdeen or Stanton 1b is a natural satellite of Hurston. It was named after scientist Aberdeen Hurston, designer of the first Hurston Dynamics antimatter warhead. Aberdeen is notable for being the only moon in the Stanton system to feature once-thriving grasslands and scattered trees. Although some dead and desiccated examples of Aberdeen's former ecosystems remain, nothing now grows in the highly toxic, boiling environment. It is unclear how or when Aberdeen's ecosystem collapsed into its current hellscape, but it is most likely that the moon was used as a testing site for Hurston Dynamics antimatter weapons. If true this would be most ironic, given who the moon was named after. At present, Aberdeen is known primarily for being the location of the Klescher Rehabilitation Facility. == Atmosphere == Aberdeen's atmosphere is comprised primarily of sulfur dioxide and sulfur oxide, giving i

locations.name: Arial
locations.description: Arial is a moon of Hurston. This moon was named after the 3rd CEO of Hurston Dynamics, Arial Hurston, who was known for creating the controversial Life/Labor-style employee contract. Prota Harvestables can be found here. == Atmosphere == Arial's atmosphere primarily contains nitrogen, although trace amounts of methane and hydrogen are present as well. It is toxic to humans, and average temperatures are considerably above the boiling point as well; environmental survival equipment is required. Surface conditions on the moon tend to be hazy, and its temperature causes shimmering refraction effects, further reducing visibility. == Locations == === Surface outposts === === Other locations === === Artificial satellites === ==== CommArray ST1-13 ==== == Gallery == == Trivia == While initially named Ariel, this was changed to Arial on the approach to implementation in Alpha 3.3.0, likely to dis

locations.name: Daymar
locations.description: Daymar or Stanton 2b is a natural satellite of Crusader. It is named after one of the siblings from a tale called A Gift for Baba. Darnell Ajay built the first permanent homestead on Daymar in 2906. == Atmosphere == Daymar has a toxic, non-breathable nitrogen-methane atmosphere with trace amounts of hydrogen. The moon is also subject to extreme temperatures. As such, full environmental protection is an absolute necessity for surface explorers. Dust storms are a frequent occurrence close to the surface, resulting in low-visibility conditions. == Locations == === Surface outposts (with landing services) === === Surface outposts === === Unmarked locations === === Artificial Satellites === ==== Covalex Hub Gundo ==== ==== Comm Array ST2-47 ==== == Gallery == == Trivia == On 2904-03-17, Meiko Norwood collapsed here while loading soil samples into her ship. She passed away later that day due t

locations.name: Wala
locations.description: Wala is a natural satellite that orbits ArcCorp. It has a barren surface, but features outcrops of geode-like minerals. The low density of Wala is particularly susceptible to tidal forces which result in the moon being noticeably prolate. == Atmosphere == While the atmosphere is too thin to be breathable, pressure suits can replenish their oxygen supplies by extracting it from the surrounding environment. == Locations == === Surface Outposts === === Other locations === === Artificial satellites === ==== CommArray ST3-35 ==== == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: Lyria
locations.description: Lyria is a natural satellite orbiting ArcCorp. This icy moon's surface features dirty ice, active cryogeysers and cryovolcanoes that create a constant cold and humid atmosphere. == Atmosphere == Lyria has a very thin atmosphere (at a surface pressure of about 0.09 atmospheres) comprised mostly of oxygen, with trace amounts of water vapor and anhydrous ammonia. While it is too thin to be breathable, pressure suits can replenish their oxygen supplies by extracting it from the surrounding environment. == Locations == === Surface outposts === === Other locations === === Artificial satellites === ==== CommArray ST3-18 ==== == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: Magda
locations.description: This moon was named after Hurston Dynamics CEO Magda Hurston who made the decision to purchase Stanton I from the UEE. Magda is the mother of current CEO "Colonel" Gavin E. Hurston. In recent years, natural formations like Sketto Rock have become popular with visitors. == Atmosphere == Nitrogen is the predominant element found in Magda's atmosphere, with trace amounts of methane, hydrogen, and carbon dioxide rounding off its mix. It is toxic to humans and breathing equipment is required. == Locations == === Surface outposts === === Other locations === === Artificial satellites === ==== CommArray ST1-48 ==== == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: Ita
locations.description: Ita (Stanton 1d) is a natural satellite of Stanton The moon was named after Ita Hurston, who died during the First Tevarin War. == Atmosphere == Ita's atmosphere is almost entirely made of nitrogen, but contains trace amounts of methane and carbon monoxide. Breathing equipment is required for all surface activities. == Locations == === Surface outposts === === Artificial satellites === ==== Comm Array ST1-02 ==== == Gallery == == References ==

locations.name: microTech
locations.description: microTech may refer to: microTech : Stanton IV — Planet in Stanton system microTech — Company

locations.name: Calliope
locations.description: Calliope is a moon orbiting microTech. It is named after the ancient Greek muse who inspires eloquence. Beset by high winds and low temperatures, Calliope becomes so cold at night that even exceptionally insulated weather suits can fail. The dark side of this moon is a dangerous one, even to the most experienced adventurer. Low clouds and ground fog regularly reduce surface visibility to a minimum. == Atmosphere == Due to Calliope's extremely low temperatures, environmental survival gear is an absolute requirement for all surface activity. However, pressure suits can easily replenish their air supply from the moon's oxygen-rich atmosphere. == Locations == === Surface outposts === === Other locations === === Artificial satellites === ==== CommArray ST4-31 ==== == Gallery == == Trivia == In Greek mythology, Calliope is the Muse who presides over eloquence and epic poetry; so called from th

locations.name: Ignis
locations.description: Ignis is the innermost moon of Pyro V. The now dry moon features deep canyons and remains of riverbeds. Like the other moons of Pyro V are named after fire related words in different languages, "Ignis" is the Latin word for "fire". == Locations == Ashland Kabir's Post == Gallery == == References ==

resources.name: Hadanite
resources.description: Hadanite is a pinkish purple colored mineral found in small-scale rock deposits. Some deposits can be mined with a handheld mining tool, while others need at least the power of a size 0 mining laser. It can be found on both planetary surfaces or attached to asteroids. == Description == == Acquisition == == Crafting == Not used as an ingredient in any known crafting recipe. == Related == == Harvest locations == == Gallery == == Trivia == During PTU Alpha 3.15.0 there was a bug that allow players turn dropped ore into a mining node. == References ==

resources.name: Janalite
resources.description: Janalite is an extremely rare and valuable mineral found in small-scale rock deposits. == Description == == Acquisition == == Crafting == Not used as an ingredient in any known crafting recipe. == Related == == Harvest locations == == Development == == References ==

resources.name: Aphorite
resources.description: Aphorite is a mineral hand-mined for its low instability. == Description == == Acquisition == == Crafting == Not used as an ingredient in any known crafting recipe. == Related == == References ==

resources.name: Dolivine
resources.description: Dolivine is a green mineral gemstone mined by hand. == Description == == Acquisition == == Crafting == Not used as an ingredient in any known crafting recipe. == Related == == Lore == Dolivine came to prominence as a gemstone after Imperator Illyana Messer VI wore a 45 carat dolivine brooch to her niece Astrid’s wedding in 2690. == Gallery == == Development == == References ==

utility.name: Barrel attachment
utility.description: A barrel attachment is a Star Citizen weapon attachment that attaches to the barrel of a weapon to modify its behavior. == Types == == References ==

utility.name: Magazine
utility.description: A magazine is an ammunition storage and feeding device for a repeating firearm, either integral within the gun (internal/fixed magazine) or externally attached (detachable magazine). The magazine functions by holding several cartridges within itself and sequentially pushing each one into a position where it may be readily loaded into the barrel chamber by the firearm's moving action. The detachable magazine is sometimes colloquially referred to as a "clip", although this is technically inaccurate since a clip is actually an accessory device used to help load ammunition into a magazine. == References ==

utility.name: Multi-Tool attachment
utility.description: A Multi-Tool attachment is a FPS weapon attachment that attaches to a Multi-Tool such as the Pyro RYT Multi-Tool. == References ==

utility.name: Optics attachment
utility.description: A Star Citizen optical attachment is an FPS weapon attachment that uses optics that give the player an enhanced image with an aligned aiming point or pattern (also called a reticle) superimposed onto the target image, preferably at the same focal plane. == Types == Optics can be divided in four categories: == References ==

utility.name: Underbarrel attachment
utility.description: An underbarrel attachment is a FPS weapon attachment that attaches to the underbarrel/bottom of the weapon. == References ==

vendors.name: CenterMass
vendors.description: CenterMass is a Human spacecraft weapons and armor retailer with franchise stores in multiple locations across the United Empire of Earth (UEE). Founded as a weapons-only store, the company added armor to its inventory in 2939. It also keeps mechanics on staff for the installation, modification, and repair of any items purchased at a CenterMass store. == Locations == 2nd floor of the IO-North tower, Area18, ArcCorp The Plaza, New Babbage, microTech == Gallery == == References ==

vendors.name: Cubby Blast
vendors.description: Cubby Blast is a weapon dealership in Zone 1 of Area18 on ArcCorp. The store is owned and operated by the former outlaw Clor Vee, and it carries a catalog of personal weaponry, personal armor, and other defensive goods. == History == The Cubby Blast holo-jingle promises "racks of rifles, stacks of shotguns, piles of pistols," and the store has established itself as one of Area18's more eccentric locales. While most of the stores on the planet aim for an aura of respectability, Cubby Blast stands apart from the corporate culture that surrounds it. It is modeled after a weapons shop on the Spider station in the Cathcart system, and the name itself comes from a Cathcart sales phrase meaning "the weapon fires fine." This character has made Cubby Blast a popular destination for people traveling through the system, whether or not they intend to buy a weapon. The store is centered on its owner

vendors.name: Live Fire Weapons
vendors.description: Live Fire Weapons is a retail franchise that sells personal weapons and weapon attachments. Its stores operate from shopping galleries aboard space stations and orbital rest stops across the Stanton system. == Store locations == == References ==

vendors.name: Tammany and Sons
vendors.description: Tammany and Sons is a shop in Lorville owned by Hurston Dynamics. It primarily sells goods to the company's workers in a company-store arrangement that is intended to keep credits, and employees, within the Hurston ecosystem. == Location == The shop is located in the L19 Workers District of Lorville, Hurston, next to the miners' rail line. In addition to clothing and armor, it stocks Greycat Industrial's Pyro RYT Multi-Tool. It is also a source for the Gyson Ready-Up, a soft-body breathing helmet nicknamed the "baghead" that residents commonly use to cope with the planet's poor atmospheric quality. == Merchandise == == Gallery == == References ==

vendors.name: Casaba Outlet
vendors.description: Casaba Outlet is a human clothing retail franchise founded by the siblings Jean and Joel Polanco. It sells designer-style fashion at affordable prices and has grown from a single storefront on Lyre to a chain reaching from the Corel to Chronos systems across nearly the entire UEE. == History == Jean and Joel Polanco grew up aboard their family's Freelancer as their parents worked as independent cargo haulers, crisscrossing the systems in search of work. Jean became fascinated with the cultural differences between planets and began buying distinctive items on one world to resell on the next, realizing that a cheap trinket from one system could be a statement piece in another. The pair later shifted from selling single curiosities to buying remnant stock in bulk from small and medium softline manufacturers, and their ship became known in various landing zones for stylish yet affordable clo

vendors.name: Mining Support Center
vendors.description: The Mining Support Center is a location commonly found on Refinery Decks on Rest Stop stations. It contains a supply shop that sells various mining supplies. == References ==

lootSources.name: Erkul page scan
lootSources.description: Supplementary scan of Erkul public pages for items, shops, and location references.

lootSources.name: SC Crafter fallback import run
lootSources.description: Supplementary fallback scrape import from SC Crafter

weapons.name: C54 SMG
weapons.description: The C54 SMG is a 10 mm, fully automatic submachine gun manufactured by Gemini. It boasts a visually appealing design with purple accents and a sleek, well-balanced structure. Its lightweight polymer frame and ergonomic design make it an ideal weapon for close quarter combat. The firearm has an effective range of 35 meters and is capable of firing 10mm rounds on full auto, providing maximum support and target saturation to ensure swift engagement resolution. The C54's features make it a reliable and efficient weapon for tactical operations. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The C54 SMG is introduced in Alpha 3.10.0. == References ==

weapons.name: P4-AR Rifle
weapons.description: The P4-AR Rifle is a 5.56mm, selective-fire assault rifle manufactured by Behring Applied Technology. It boasts an effective range of 50 meters and can be operated in semi-automatic, three-round burst, and fully automatic modes. The P4-AR rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock and shortened barrel, rendering it a suitable option for close-quarter combat. Its accuracy and user-friendly design have earned it widespread recognition among security, military, and civilian users alike, cementing its status as a highly regarded firearm. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Lore == The P4-AR Rifle was the standard issue rifle for the United Empire of Earth military. == Gallery == == Trivia == In October 2019 it was revealed that the P4-AR Rifle had been the most popular assault rifle for the Janu

weapons.name: P8-SC SMG
weapons.description: The P8-SC SMG is a 10-mm, selective-fire submachine gun manufactured by Behring Applied Technology. It boasts an effective range of 30 meters and can be fired in rapid or burst mode. The weapon features a folding stock for ease of transport and storage. The UEE Marines, widely regarded as the top fighting force in the 'verse, have adopted the P8-SC as their standard ballistic submachine gun. However, the weapon has also gained popularity among civilians seeking personal safety and protection. Its widespread use is a testament to its reliability and effectiveness in combat situations. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The P8-SC SMG is introduced in Alpha 3.0.0. == Trivia == In October 2019 it was revealed that the P8-SC SMG had been the most popular submachine g

weapons.name: FS-9 LMG
weapons.description: The FS-9 LMG is a 5-mm light machine gun manufactured by Behring Applied Technology. With an effective range of 40 meters, the FS-9 is designed to be a dominant force on the battlefield. Behring's intention was to create a weapon that could provide overwhelming firepower. The full auto mode of the light machine gun is particularly useful for laying down covering fire or holding back advancing enemies. Additionally, the FS-9 is renowned for its ability to maintain accuracy while unleashing sustained fire, making it a highly effective weapon in combat situations. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The FS-9 LMG is introduced in Alpha 3.12.0. == References ==

weapons.name: Gallant Rifle
weapons.description: The Gallant Rifle, produced by Klaus & Werner, is a selective-fire assault rifle that utilizes laser technology. With an effective range of 50 meters, it can be fired in three and five burst modes. Klaus & Werner prides itself on creating reliable assault weapons that stand the test of time, and the Gallant is no exception. This energy-based rifle is designed to deliver precise and sustained fire at medium-range targets. Additionally, its high-capacity power system enables operators to fire a greater number of shots per battery, making it a valuable asset in combat situations. == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The Gallant Rifle was formerly known as the ATT-4 Energy Rifle and introduced in Alpha 2.2.0, with the following description: Despite all the advances in weapon technology

weapons.name: Custodian SMG
weapons.description: The Custodian SMG is a laser, fully automatic submachine gun manufactured by Kastak Arms. It is designed to prioritize a high rate of fire over damage and accuracy, making it an optimal selection for navigating through confined spaces and engaging in close quarters combat. With an effective range of 30 meters, this weapon can be utilized in automatic, burst, and charge modes. Its versatility and adaptability make it a valuable asset in various tactical situations. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The Custodian SMG was formerly known as the Reaver in the early concept art. It is introduced in Alpha 3.1.0. == Trivia == The Custodian SMG has a top-loaded magazine, similar to the real-life submachine gun FN P90. == References ==

weapons.name: S71 Rifle
weapons.description: The S71 Rifle is a semi-automatic assault rifle manufactured by Gemini. With a caliber of 5 mm, it boasts an effective range of 50 meters and comes with the OT4-RF (4x Telescopic) optics in its default loadout. Gemini's design of the S71 prioritizes ergonomics, making it an ideal weapon for mid-range engagements. Despite its smaller caliber round compared to other weapons in its class, the S71 has gained popularity among private military professionals due to its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy. == Description == == Ports == == Acquisition == The weapon is not purchasable at in-game shops and is only available in random loot boxes or from NPC's. == Crafting == === Blueprints === === Dismantle === == Related == === Variants === == Gallery == == Development == The S71 Rifle is introduced in Alpha 3.5.0. == References ==

armor.name: ADP-mk4
armor.description: The ADP-mk4 is a heavy armor developed by Clark Defense Systems for the UEE Marine Corps. Its maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor. == Description == == Base Variants == == Special Variants == == Gallery == == References ==

armor.name: ORC-mkV
armor.description: Clark Defense Systems' ORC-mkV armor has been a trusted and enduring choice on the battlefield for centuries. This medium armor is highly regarded for its dependable and durable construction, which combines composite plating with a special fiber reinforced polymer. The result is a solid level of protection that allows for a wide range of movement. The ORC-mkV is a prime example of how dependable and durable armor never goes out of style, and continues to be a staple for those who require reliable protection in high-risk situations. == Description == == Base Variants ==

armor.name: ORC-mkX
armor.description: The mark X is the latest in CDS' award-winning Omni-Role Combat armor series. This EVA-rated suit features new EdgeCore composite weave technology, maximizing protection against projectiles, explosives and the elements while minimizing operator agility. == Description == == Base Variants ==

armor.name: PAB-1
armor.description: Clark Defense Systems built the PAB-1 light but strong enough to stay in a fight. The first CDS suit to utilize their proprietary nano-weave, this light armor became a favorite of those who needed a little extra protection while remaining agile. == Description == == Base Variants ==

armor.name: FBL-8a
armor.description: The FBL-8a set is an armor set manufactured by Clark Defense Systems. There are currently three color variants available. No helmet belongs to the armor set as of the current LIVE build, but the Mandible Helmet is believed to be the one. == Description == == Base Variants == == Development == The FBL-8a set was introduced in Alpha 3.11.1 in the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo 2950 event. == References ==
